name: Senolytics review-landscape coverage-gap repair

scope.question: Can the senolytics track add a recent systematic-review or meta-analysis source to repair the review-landscape coverage gap?

summary: Submitted a partial candidate that preserves the review-landscape gap and records a blocked no-op search/screening trail. No source-snapshot-backed systematic-review or meta-analysis source was added because the job supplied no context pack or source row and PubMed snapshot retrieval was unavailable from the worker environment.

search_log.query: (senolytics OR senolytic OR senotherapeutic) AND (systematic review OR meta-analysis OR trial-landscape review)
search_log.summary: The worker attempted to reach PubMed/NLM tooling but DNS resolution was unavailable, so no PubMed hit list or source snapshot could be created in this pass.
